overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a rainy cyberpunk city street at night in a video game. Neon green and yellow lights reflect off wet pavement as pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the sidewalk and vehicles pass by on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with green neon building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the green neon-lit building facade

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying an umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall building facade with vertical green neon strip lighting and red triangular signage
continuous horizontal yellow lighting along the right side structure
elevated highway or monorail track spanning across the street ahead
rain-slicked pavement reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk beneath an overpass, with a green neon-lit building on the left and yellow-lit structures on the right. Rain falls steadily, creating reflections on the wet concrete. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with pagoda-style tower landmark

events.description: red sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the street opens up ahead

entered.detail: distinctive multi-tiered tower with illuminated windows and traditional Asian architectural elements

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the widening street as a distinctive pagoda-style tower becomes visible in the distance. A red sports car speeds past on the right. The green neon facade remains on the left while the street opens up toward the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked intersection with traditional-modern fusion architecture

events.description: camera turns right to cross the intersection toward the pagoda tower
multiple vehicles including a black SUV pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right and crossing the wet intersection while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
multiple vehicles driving through the intersection with headlights reflecting on wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the intersection to cross the street, revealing the full view of the pagoda tower. Vehicles including a black SUV drive through the intersection, their headlights cutting through the rain. The green neon building falls behind as the camera enters the open crosswalk area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk street that transitions from a narrow, enclosed walkway into a wide, open intersection. It begins beneath a dark overpass, moving along a sidewalk where green and yellow neon lights reflect off wet concrete as pedestrians with umbrellas approach. As the street widens, the camera continues past a glowing green facade while a red sports car speeds by, revealing a distinctive pagoda-style tower emerging in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right at the intersection, leaving the neon building behind to cross the street. Finally, the view opens fully toward the pagoda tower as vehicles, including a black SUV, drive through the rain with headlights cutting through the gloom.
